name: Scottish Brown Bread9scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 325°F or Mark 3.
2. Grease a 900g loaf tin.
3. Mix the flours, salt, bicarbonate of soda and cream of tartar together in a bowl.
4. Add the golden syrup and mix with sufficient milk to form a soft dough.
5. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead very gently.
6. Place in the tin and cover with foil.
7. Bake for about 50 minutes.
8. Remove the foil and bake for a further 10 minutes until the top is nicely browned.
9. Turn out on to a wire rack to cool. Eat at once.
This is an old Scottish recipe for simple, wholesome bread which requires no proving.
